Title: 4-Inch Charging Cable
Description: Charges your phone as long as you hold it 4 inches from the outlet. Perfect for people who enjoy commitment. USB-C to USB-C. Braided.

Title: TV Remote (400 Buttons)
Description: Controls everything. You will use 3 buttons. The other 397 are for features your TV does not have and never will. Batteries included — wrong size.

Title: Headphones (No Audio)
Description: Premium over-ear design. Noise cancelling so advanced it also cancels music. Look like you're listening. You are not listening.

Title: Smart Plug (Dumb Device)
Description: Requires 14 steps to set up. App needs an account. Account needs a verification code. Code expires. Turns lamp on and off. Your lamp was already doing that.

Title: Laptop Stand (No Laptop Included)
Description: Ergonomic. Aluminum. Adjustable to 3 heights: bad, slightly less bad, and one you'll never use. Laptop sold separately by a company that doesn't make stands.

Title: Colander (No Holes)
Description: Stainless steel. Dishwasher safe. Holds water indefinitely. Great for displaying fruit or reconsidering your pasta strategy.

Title: Single-Use Fork
Description: Premium stainless steel. Meant to be used once and reflected upon. Dishwasher safe but spiritually, this fork is done. Sold individually.

Title: Knife (Too Small)
Description: 3mm blade. Serrated. Full tang. Cannot cut bread, tomatoes, or tension. Ideal for very small cheeses and garnishes that don't need garnishing.

Title: Non-Stick Pan (Very Sticky)
Description: PFOA-free coating that adheres to everything except the non-stick promise. Oven safe to 200°F which is below most cooking temperatures. Hand wash only — it won't help.

Title: Measuring Cup (No Measurements)
Description: Holds liquid. How much liquid? That's between you and your recipe. Clear plastic. Good grip. Completely unmarked. Cook with confidence or don't.

Title: Shirt (One Sleeve)
Description: 100% cotton. Machine washable. One sleeve — the right one. Asymmetric design that says you make choices. Available in S/M/L/XL. Left arm: free.

Title: Socks (Sold Individually)
Description: One sock. Premium cotton blend. Left foot. If you need the right one that's a separate purchase and a separate relationship. Comes gift-boxed.

Title: Jeans (No Pockets)
Description: Slim fit denim. Five pocket styling — all decorative. Your belongings are your problem. Sits at the waist. Looks great. Holds nothing. Truly nothing.

Title: Hat (Visor in the Back)
Description: Structured 6-panel cap. Visor faces rear. Sun protection for your neck — statistically the most sunburned area. Adjustable strap. Statement piece.

Title: Scarf (Summer Weight)
Description: Lightweight merino wool. Ideal for July. Pairs with sunscreen and a look on people's faces. Machine wash cold. 72 inches. You'll find a use for it.

Title: 1 lb Dumbbell Set (Pair)
Description: Two dumbbells. 1 lb each. Neoprene grip. Great for wrist curls, very light groceries, and the illusion of a home gym. Results: minimal. Commitment: implied.

Title: Participation Trophy (Blank)
Description: Gold resin. Marble base. Engraving plate left intentionally empty. For the event. You know the one. Arrives in a felt-lined box. You showed up.

Title: Pedometer (Starts at 10000)
Description: You already hit your goal. Display reads 10,000 steps on startup. The day is yours. Clip to waistband and live freely. Battery lasts 6 months of doing nothing.

Title: Yoga Mat (No Grip)
Description: 6mm thick. Extra wide. PVC free. Slides on hardwood, carpet, and most spiritual journeys. Folds flat. Comes with a carry strap for the trip to the donation bin.

Title: Water Bottle (Leaks Slightly)
Description: BPA-free. 32oz. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Lid rated for upright use only. Consistent 2% leak guaranteed to keep you on your toes. Dishwasher safe lid, hand wash bottle — or reverse that, it won't matter.

Title: Moisturizer (Just Water)
Description: Hypoallergenic. Fragrance-free. Dermatologist-tested. Active ingredient: H2O. Proprietary formula. pH balanced. Honestly just water in a very nice bottle.

Title: 72-Step Skincare Routine (One Bottle)
Description: Cleanse. Tone. Treat. Essence. Serum. Moisturize. SPF. Repeat x65. All in one pump bottle. Steps 47-72 are emotional. Results visible in 6-8 decades.

Title: Dry Shampoo (Wet)
Description: All the convenience of dry shampoo. All the wetness of regular shampoo. Spray on. Wait. Your hair is now wet. You needed a shower anyway.

Title: Toothbrush (No Bristles)
Description: Ergonomic handle. Soft grip. ADA compliant handle design. Bristle zone left open for personal interpretation. Manual. Replace every 3 months or whenever.

Title: Perfume (Smells Like Nothing)
Description: Eau de vide. Top notes: absence. Heart: restraint. Base: the memory of a scent. 50ml. Spray twice. Nothing happens. You are unbothered. You smell like a decision.

Title: 900-Page Book (One Sentence)
Description: Hardcover. Gilded edges. The sentence is on page 451. It is a good sentence. The rest is leading. Foreword by nobody. Index: empty. Rated 4.8 stars.

Title: Self-Help Book (Just Says Try Harder)
Description: 352 pages. Chapter 1: Try harder. Chapter 2: No really. Chapter 3: Have you tried being different? Includes a 30-day journal. The journal is also blank.

Title: Cookbook (No Recipes)
Description: Beautiful food photography. 214 pages of plated dishes you will never make because the recipes are not here. Suggested wine pairings included. Great coffee table book.

Title: Journal (Pre-Filled with Excuses)
Description: 200 pages. Dated. Each entry already written with a different reason you didn't work out, call back, or finish the thing. Leather cover. Ribbon bookmark. Very relatable.

Title: Board Game (No Instructions)
Description: 6 players. 400 pieces. 12 card types. 3 dice of different sizes. Absolutely no instructions. Figure it out. The game rewards whoever argues most confidently.

Title: Puzzle (One Extra Piece Included)
Description: 1000 pieces. Completed image: a mountain. All pieces fit perfectly except one extra. It looks like it should go somewhere. It does not go somewhere. 27x20 inches.

Title: Deck of Cards (No Face Cards)
Description: 40 cards. Ace through 10, four suits. Beautifully printed. The royals have been removed. No reason given. Great for games that don't require faces. Most games require faces.

Title: Action Figure (No Articulation)
Description: 6-inch figure. Highly detailed sculpt. Zero points of articulation. Stands in one pose. That pose is: slightly uncomfortable. Collector quality. Display only.

Title: Throw Pillow (Uncomfortable)
Description: 18x18 inches. Decorative cover: gorgeous. Insert: a firm opinion. Not for sleeping. Not for leaning. For throwing on the couch so the couch looks done.

Title: Candle (No Scent)
Description: Hand-poured soy wax. 40-hour burn time. Cotton wick. Smells like a candle that isn't lit. Mood: present. Ambiance: you tried. Pairs with the perfume that smells like nothing.

Title: Rug (Slightly Too Small)
Description: 4x6 feet. Just under what the room needs. Floats in the space. Furniture won't sit on it correctly. Designer approved. Photographed well. Ships rolled.

Title: Clock (One Hand)
Description: Minimalist wall clock. 12-inch face. One hand: the hour hand. You'll figure out the minutes. Requires 1 AA battery. Silent sweep. Very modern. Somewhat useless.

Title: Organic Cereal (Just Oats)
Description: Certified organic. Non-GMO. Gluten-free facility. Single ingredient: oats. No added sugar, flavor, or reason to choose this over the bag of oats. Premium box though.

Title: Sparkling Water (No Bubbles)
Description: Premium still water in a can that used to have bubbles. Something happened during canning. The label still says sparkling. The water does not agree. Refreshing anyway.

Title: Artisanal Toast (Unsliced)
Description: Single-origin sourdough. Stone-milled flour. Cold-fermented 48 hours. Baked to order. Shipped as one full loaf that has been toasted. Arrive with a knife. We did not include one.

Title: Coffee (Decaf Espresso Roast)
Description: Dark roast. Single origin. Notes of chocolate and futility. All the intensity of an espresso roast with none of the effect. For people who love the ritual and hate sleep anyway.

Title: Stapler (No Staples Included)
Description: Full-size desktop stapler. 20-sheet capacity — theoretically. Chrome finish. Jam-resistant mechanism. Staples sold separately by a company with no relationship to this stapler.

Title: Highlighter (Black)
Description: Chisel tip. Fast-drying. Permanent. Highlights text in black, rendering it unreadable and permanent. Great for redacting documents you still need to read.

Title: Sticky Notes (Not Sticky)
Description: 3x3 inches. 100 sheets. Pastel assorted. Post them anywhere. They will not stay. Follow up with tape. Tape sold separately. Great color selection for notes nobody will see.

Title: Desk Chair (No Wheels)
Description: Ergonomic lumbar support. Breathable mesh back. Adjustable height. Stationary base — not by design, they fell off in shipping. Stand up to reposition. Core strengthening bonus.

Title: Dog Bed (Cat Sized)
Description: Plush orthopedic foam. Removable washable cover. Fits cats perfectly. Listed under dogs. Your dog will look at it. Your cat will immediately claim it. Order accordingly.

Title: Pet Cologne (For Pets Who Don't Want It)
Description: Lavender and oat. Spray on. Pet leaves room. Spray dissipates. Pet returns. 4oz bottle. Dermatologist tested — on a dermatologist's dog who also left the room.

Title: Aquarium (Fish Sold Separately)
Description: 10-gallon glass tank. Filter included. Gravel included. Decorative castle included. Fish: not included, not our department, genuinely not sure where you get those.

Title: Car Air Freshener (Smells Like New Car Smell Air Freshener)
Description: Hangs from mirror. Scent: New Car Smell. That scent is itself an air freshener scent. You are now two levels deep. Your car smells like a metaphor. Lasts 30 days.

Title: Parking Permit (Unspecified Lot)
Description: Official-looking hang tag. Lot number: TBD. Valid: possibly. Laminated. Punched hole. Blue and white. Has worked in 0 documented situations. Shipped same day.

Title: Windshield Sunshade (Slightly Too Narrow)
Description: Reflective silver. Folds accordion-style. Covers 94% of your windshield. The remaining 6% lets in exactly enough sun to heat the steering wheel to an unreasonable temperature.
